objective: Find recent P-007 alpha messages, read the selected thread, draft a reply, label two reviewed messages, and send only after explicit confirmation.

planned_actions.description: Search metadata first with a narrow Gmail query and INBOX label filter.
Read only the selected thread returned by the search.
Create a reply draft for human review before any send.
Apply the user label Project/P-007 to reviewed messages after confirmation because multiple messages are affected.
planned_actions.human_confirmation: CONFIRMED: apply Project/P-007 to msg-001 and msg-002

planned_actions.description: Send only the approved draft after the user confirms recipients, subject, and body summary.
planned_actions.subject: Re: P-007 alpha
planned_actions.human_confirmation: CONFIRMED: send approved P-007 draft to recipient@example.com
